HGSS.640.0001:
Hello? Hello? Hello? Hello?
...I think we have a bad connection.\f
Could you try again from another spot?
HGSS.640.0002:
Nice to hear from you.
How is everything with you?\r
I’m good.\f
HGSS.640.0003:
There are a lot more stronger
Gym Leaders than me...\r
So get tough or go home!
HGSS.640.0004:
What’s your point?
If you want to battle me again, fine.\r
Friday nights, take it or leave it.\f
Call me then... Maybe I’ll answer...
HGSS.640.0005:
Well, well, you called at the right time!
You want to battle again?\f
I’m up for it.[0200,0000]
HGSS.640.0006:
Ha ha ha.
It’s great that you’re stepping up.\f
I’ll be waiting for you at the
Fighting Dojo in Saffron City!
HGSS.640.0007:
What in the world?
Are you trying to make fun of me?!
HGSS.640.0008:
You figure you want to battle me?\f
I’m wondering if you have time enough
to do me justice.\f
I hear you made promises to meet some
other people. You should respect those\r
first, is what I think.
HGSS.640.0009:
I’m waiting for you at the Fighting Dojo
in Saffron City...\r
Don’t wuss out.
HGSS.640.0010:
Yes, it’s Clair here...
Oh, hi. How are you doing?\f
HGSS.640.0011:
Keep in mind we’re meeting at the
Fighting Dojo in Saffron City.\r
It’s a promise I’m waiting to keep...
HGSS.640.0012:
Lately some people from the
Radio Station came around, wanting to\r
do a piece on me, or something.\f
My fans definitely won’t want to
miss watching that!\f
Oh, no! I was confused! It’s radio!
All those people tuning in, and they\r
won’t be able to see my glorious face!\f
What about TV?
Why hasn’t a TV crew come to do a piece\r
on me?!
HGSS.640.0013:
Lately there seems to be some gossip
running through town that I am the\r
latest name in fashion.\f
Well, if I’m that cool that people can’t
stop talking about me, I can totally\r
understand that sentiment.
HGSS.640.0014:
Wow, you seem like you’re a pretty busy
person, aren’t you? Even more than\r
I am, if that could possibly be.\f
I mean, I’ve got my Gym work, and I’ve
got to go see the Elder at the\r
Dragon Tamer’s shrine, too.\f
What do you think?
You’ve got talent--you could become\r
a Dragon Tamer, too. Think so?
